rules: Do NOT use Inter, Roboto, or standard SaaS fonts for headings.
H1 Max text-5xl or text-6xl with tracking-tight.
Labels/Overlines must be uppercase, text-xs or text-sm, wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Keep body text legible with Manrope text-sm to text-base.

layout.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12 for generous breathing room in the dashboard.
layout.dashboard_grid: MODE B: Control Room Grid. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6 for Admin Panel.
layout.surface_strategy: Cards: Flat dark backgrounds with 1px border (#21362A). No muddy box-shadows. Header: Glassmorphism (bg-black/60, backdrop-blur-xl, border-b border-white/10).

motion.hover_states: -translate-y-1, text color changes, subtle glow using box-shadow for primary buttons.
motion.libraries: framer-motion for elegant layout transitions and micro-interactions (e.g., product generation loader).

components.cards: Sharp or slightly rounded (max 4px to 8px). Flat colors.
components.buttons: Primary buttons: Gold bg (#D4AF37) with black text. Sharp edges.
components.tables: Shadcn-based, minimal styling, transparent row backgrounds, bottom border only.
components.inputs: Dark backgrounds (#0C140F), subtle border, gold focus rings (focus:ring-primary).
components.testing: MANDATORY data-testid attributes for ALL interactable buttons, links, inputs, and state elements (e.g., data-testid='punch-in-btn').

image_urls.description: Smooth dark green silk fabric texture used as full-bleed background for the login screen to establish luxury tone.
Crumpled gold fabric texture for use in subtle premium accents or admin dashboard banner backgrounds.
African woman in vibrant dress, to be used in Worker Dashboard as assigned image sample.
Portrait of a woman in African fashion, to be used in Admin Image Library.
Luxury clothing accessory flatlay, to be used in Generate Product or Admin Image Library.

rules: Never use generic placeholder images like via.placeholder.com.
Use the product_sample URLs for all mocked product flows and library inventories.

instructions_to_main_agent: Force dark mode configuration. The app is a premium dark theme natively.
Apply 'Playfair Display' for Headings and 'Manrope' for body copy.
Worker Dashboard: Optimize for single-task focus. Large assigned image, clear final generated price, prominent punch in/out features.
Admin Dashboard: Build a dense but elegant 'Bento Grid' with specific sections for Attendance, AI Usage, Activity Logs, and Pricing Rules.
Avoid standard 'Vercel SaaS' look. Incorporate the provided silk and gold textures subtly (e.g. as masked overlays).
Replace Shadcn's default slate colors with our custom jewel-tone palette (surface, background, border).
Never skip 'data-testid' on interactive elements. This is crucial for testing.
